hooks.command: $f = $input | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty tool_input | Select-Object -ExpandProperty file_path; if ($f -match '\.py$') { Set-Location 'C:\Users\shark\Desktop\AI\Skip spotify track'; git add $f; $msg = "auto: update $([System.IO.Path]::GetFileName($f))"; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git commit -m $msg; git push } }
